verses.text_hebrew: וַיַּ֣רְא בִּלְעָ֗ם כִּ֣י ט֞וֹב בְּעֵינֵ֤י יְהֹוָה֙ לְבָרֵ֣ךְ אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל וְלֹא־הָלַ֥ךְ כְּפַֽעַם־בְּפַ֖עַם לִקְרַ֣את נְחָשִׁ֑ים וַיָּ֥שֶׁת אֶל־הַמִּדְבָּ֖ר פָּנָֽיו׃
verses.text_kjv: And when Balaam saw that it pleased the LORD to bless Israel, he went not, as at other times, to seek for enchantments, but he set his face toward the wilderness.
verses.rendering: when Balaam saw that it pleased the LORD to bless Israel, he went not, as at other times, to seek for enchantments, but he set his face toward the wilderness.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיִּשָּׂ֨א בִלְעָ֜ם אֶת־עֵינָ֗יו וַיַּרְא֙ אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל שֹׁכֵ֖ן לִשְׁבָטָ֑יו וַתְּהִ֥י עָלָ֖יו ר֥וּחַ אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.text_kjv: And Balaam lifted up his eyes, and he saw Israel abiding in his tents according to their tribes; and the spirit of God came upon him.
verses.rendering: Balaam lifted up his eyes, and he saw Israel abiding in his tents according to their tribes; and the spirit of God came upon him.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיִּשָּׂ֥א מְשָׁל֖וֹ וַיֹּאמַ֑ר נְאֻ֤ם בִּלְעָם֙ בְּנ֣וֹ בְעֹ֔ר וּנְאֻ֥ם הַגֶּ֖בֶר שְׁתֻ֥ם הָעָֽיִן׃
verses.text_kjv: And he took up his parable, and said, Balaam the son of Beor hath said, and the man whose eyes are open hath said:
verses.rendering: he took up his parable, and said, Balaam the son of Beor has said, and the man whose eyes are open has said:
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: נְאֻ֕ם שֹׁמֵ֖עַ אִמְרֵי־אֵ֑ל אֲשֶׁ֨ר מַחֲזֵ֤ה שַׁדַּי֙ יֶֽחֱזֶ֔ה נֹפֵ֖ל וּגְל֥וּי עֵינָֽיִם׃
verses.text_kjv: He hath said, which heard the words of God, which saw the vision of the Almighty, falling into a trance, but having his eyes open:
verses.rendering: He has said, which heard the words of God, which saw the vision of the Almighty, falling into a trance, but having his eyes open:
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: מַה־טֹּ֥בוּ אֹהָלֶ֖יךָ יַעֲקֹ֑ב מִשְׁכְּנֹתֶ֖יךָ יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.text_kjv: How goodly are thy tents, O Jacob, and thy tabernacles, O Israel!
verses.rendering: How goodly are your tents, O Jacob, and your tabernacles, O Israel!
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: כִּנְחָלִ֣ים נִטָּ֔יוּ כְּגַנֹּ֖ת עֲלֵ֣י נָהָ֑ר כַּאֲהָלִים֙ נָטַ֣ע יְהֹוָ֔ה כַּאֲרָזִ֖ים עֲלֵי־מָֽיִם׃
verses.text_kjv: As the valleys are they spread forth, as gardens by the river’s side, as the trees of lign aloes which the LORD hath planted, and as cedar trees beside the waters.
verses.rendering: As the valleys are they spread forth, as gardens by the river’s side, as the trees of lign aloes which the LORD has planted, and as cedar trees beside the waters.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: יִֽזַּל־מַ֙יִם֙ מִדָּ֣לְיָ֔ו וְזַרְע֖וֹ בְּמַ֣יִם רַבִּ֑ים וְיָרֹ֤ם מֵֽאֲגַג֙ מַלְכּ֔וֹ וְתִנַּשֵּׂ֖א מַלְכֻתֽוֹ׃
verses.text_kjv: He shall pour the water out of his buckets, and his seed shall be in many waters, and his king shall be higher than Agag, and his kingdom shall be exalted.
verses.rendering: He shall pour the water out of his buckets, and his seed shall be in many waters, and his king shall be higher than Agag, and his kingdom shall be exalted.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: אֵ֚ל מוֹצִיא֣וֹ מִמִּצְרַ֔יִם כְּתוֹעֲפֹ֥ת רְאֵ֖ם ל֑וֹ יֹאכַ֞ל גּוֹיִ֣ם צָרָ֗יו וְעַצְמֹתֵיהֶ֛ם יְגָרֵ֖ם וְחִצָּ֥יו יִמְחָֽץ׃
verses.text_kjv: God brought him forth out of Egypt; he hath as it were the strength of an unicorn: he shall eat up the nations his enemies, and shall break their bones, and pierce them through with his arrows.
verses.rendering: God brought him forth out of Egypt; he has as it were the strength of an unicorn: he shall eat up the nations his enemies, and shall break their bones, and pierce them through with his arrows.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: כָּרַ֨ע שָׁכַ֧ב כַּאֲרִ֛י וּכְלָבִ֖יא מִ֣י יְקִימֶ֑נּוּ מְבָרְכֶ֣יךָ בָר֔וּךְ וְאֹרְרֶ֖יךָ אָרֽוּר׃
verses.text_kjv: He couched, he lay down as a lion, and as a great lion: who shall stir him up? Blessed is he that blesseth thee, and cursed is he that curseth thee.
verses.rendering: He couched, he lay down as a lion, and as a great lion: who shall stir him up? Blessed is he that blesseth you, and cursed is he that curseth you.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיִּֽחַר־אַ֤ף בָּלָק֙ אֶל־בִּלְעָ֔ם וַיִּסְפֹּ֖ק אֶת־כַּפָּ֑יו וַיֹּ֨אמֶר בָּלָ֜ק אֶל־בִּלְעָ֗ם לָקֹ֤ב אֹֽיְבַי֙ קְרָאתִ֔יךָ וְהִנֵּה֙ בֵּרַ֣כְתָּ בָרֵ֔ךְ זֶ֖ה שָׁלֹ֥שׁ פְּעָמִֽים׃
verses.text_kjv: And Balak’s anger was kindled against Balaam, and he smote his hands together: and Balak said unto Balaam, I called thee to curse mine enemies, and, behold, thou hast altogether blessed them these three times.
verses.rendering: Balak’s anger was kindled against Balaam, and he smote his hands together: and Balak said to Balaam, I called you to curse mine enemies, and, behold, you hast altogether blessed them these three times.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וְעַתָּ֖ה בְּרַח־לְךָ֣ אֶל־מְקוֹמֶ֑ךָ אָמַ֙רְתִּי֙ כַּבֵּ֣ד אֲכַבֶּדְךָ֔ וְהִנֵּ֛ה מְנָעֲךָ֥ יְהֹוָ֖ה מִכָּבֽוֹד׃
verses.text_kjv: Therefore now flee thou to thy place: I thought to promote thee unto great honour; but, lo, the LORD hath kept thee back from honour.
verses.rendering: Therefore now flee you to your place: I thought to promote you to great honour; but, lo, the LORD has kept you back from honour.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיֹּ֥אמֶר בִּלְעָ֖ם אֶל־בָּלָ֑ק הֲלֹ֗א גַּ֧ם אֶל־מַלְאָכֶ֛יךָ אֲשֶׁר־שָׁלַ֥חְתָּ אֵלַ֖י דִּבַּ֥רְתִּי לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.text_kjv: And Balaam said unto Balak, Spake I not also to thy messengers which thou sentest unto me, saying,
verses.rendering: Balaam said to Balak, Spake I not also to your messengers which you sentest to me, saying,
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: אִם־יִתֶּן־לִ֨י בָלָ֜ק מְלֹ֣א בֵיתוֹ֮ כֶּ֣סֶף וְזָהָב֒ לֹ֣א אוּכַ֗ל לַעֲבֹר֙ אֶת־פִּ֣י יְהֹוָ֔ה לַעֲשׂ֥וֹת טוֹבָ֛ה א֥וֹ רָעָ֖ה מִלִּבִּ֑י אֲשֶׁר־יְדַבֵּ֥ר יְהֹוָ֖ה אֹת֥וֹ אֲדַבֵּֽר׃
verses.text_kjv: If Balak would give me his house full of silver and gold, I cannot go beyond the commandment of the LORD, to do either good or bad of mine own mind; but what the LORD saith, that will I speak?
verses.rendering: If Balak would give me his house full of silver and gold, I cannot go beyond the commandment of the LORD, to do either good or bad of mine own mind; but what the LORD says, that will I speak?
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וְעַתָּ֕ה הִנְנִ֥י הוֹלֵ֖ךְ לְעַמִּ֑י לְכָה֙ אִיעָ֣צְךָ֔ אֲשֶׁ֨ר יַעֲשֶׂ֜ה הָעָ֥ם הַזֶּ֛ה לְעַמְּךָ֖ בְּאַחֲרִ֥ית הַיָּמִֽים׃
verses.text_kjv: And now, behold, I go unto my people: come therefore, and I will advertise thee what this people shall do to thy people in the latter days.
verses.rendering: now, behold, I go to my people: come therefore, and I will advertise you what this people shall do to your people in the latter days.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיִּשָּׂ֥א מְשָׁל֖וֹ וַיֹּאמַ֑ר נְאֻ֤ם בִּלְעָם֙ בְּנ֣וֹ בְעֹ֔ר וּנְאֻ֥ם הַגֶּ֖בֶר שְׁתֻ֥ם הָעָֽיִן׃
verses.text_kjv: And he took up his parable, and said, Balaam the son of Beor hath said, and the man whose eyes are open hath said:
verses.rendering: he took up his parable, and said, Balaam the son of Beor has said, and the man whose eyes are open has said:
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: נְאֻ֗ם שֹׁמֵ֙עַ֙ אִמְרֵי־אֵ֔ל וְיֹדֵ֖עַ דַּ֣עַת עֶלְי֑וֹן מַחֲזֵ֤ה שַׁדַּי֙ יֶֽחֱזֶ֔ה נֹפֵ֖ל וּגְל֥וּי עֵינָֽיִם׃
verses.text_kjv: He hath said, which heard the words of God, and knew the knowledge of the most High, which saw the vision of the Almighty, falling into a trance, but having his eyes open:
verses.rendering: He has said, which heard the words of God, and knew the knowledge of the most High, which saw the vision of the Almighty, falling into a trance, but having his eyes open:
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: אֶרְאֶ֙נּוּ֙ וְלֹ֣א עַתָּ֔ה אֲשׁוּרֶ֖נּוּ וְלֹ֣א קָר֑וֹב דָּרַ֨ךְ כּוֹכָ֜ב מִֽיַּעֲקֹ֗ב וְקָ֥ם שֵׁ֙בֶט֙ מִיִּשְׂרָאֵ֔ל וּמָחַץ֙ פַּאֲתֵ֣י מוֹאָ֔ב וְקַרְקַ֖ר כׇּל־בְּנֵי־שֵֽׁת׃
verses.text_kjv: I shall see him, but not now: I shall behold him, but not nigh: there shall come a Star out of Jacob, and a Sceptre shall rise out of Israel, and shall smite the corners of Moab, and destroy all the children of Sheth.
verses.rendering: I shall see him, but not now: I shall behold him, but not nigh: there shall come a Star out of Jacob, and a Sceptre shall rise out of Israel, and shall smite the corners of Moab, and destroy all the children of Sheth.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וְהָיָ֨ה אֱד֜וֹם יְרֵשָׁ֗ה וְהָיָ֧ה יְרֵשָׁ֛ה שֵׂעִ֖יר אֹיְבָ֑יו וְיִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל עֹ֥שֶׂה חָֽיִל׃
verses.text_kjv: And Edom shall be a possession, Seir also shall be a possession for his enemies; and Israel shall do valiantly.
verses.rendering: Edom shall be a possession, Seir also shall be a possession for his enemies; and Israel shall do valiantly.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וְיֵ֖רְדְּ מִֽיַּעֲקֹ֑ב וְהֶֽאֱבִ֥יד שָׂרִ֖יד מֵעִֽיר׃
verses.text_kjv: Out of Jacob shall come he that shall have dominion, and shall destroy him that remaineth of the city.
verses.rendering: Out of Jacob shall come he that shall have dominion, and shall destroy him that remaineth of the city.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיַּרְא֙ אֶת־עֲמָלֵ֔ק וַיִּשָּׂ֥א מְשָׁל֖וֹ וַיֹּאמַ֑ר רֵאשִׁ֤ית גּוֹיִם֙ עֲמָלֵ֔ק וְאַחֲרִית֖וֹ עֲדֵ֥י אֹבֵֽד׃
verses.text_kjv: And when he looked on Amalek, he took up his parable, and said, Amalek was the first of the nations; but his latter end shall be that he perish for ever.
verses.rendering: when he looked on Amalek, he took up his parable, and said, Amalek was the first of the nations; but his latter end shall be that he perish for ever.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיַּרְא֙ אֶת־הַקֵּינִ֔י וַיִּשָּׂ֥א מְשָׁל֖וֹ וַיֹּאמַ֑ר אֵיתָן֙ מֽוֹשָׁבֶ֔ךָ וְשִׂ֥ים בַּסֶּ֖לַע קִנֶּֽךָ׃
verses.text_kjv: And he looked on the Kenites, and took up his parable, and said, Strong is thy dwellingplace, and thou puttest thy nest in a rock.
verses.rendering: he looked on the Kenites, and took up his parable, and said, Strong is your dwellingplace, and you puttest your nest in a rock.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: כִּ֥י אִם־יִהְיֶ֖ה לְבָ֣עֵֽר קָ֑יִן עַד־מָ֖ה אַשּׁ֥וּר תִּשְׁבֶּֽךָּ׃
verses.text_kjv: Nevertheless the Kenite shall be wasted, until Asshur shall carry thee away captive.
verses.rendering: Nevertheless the Kenite shall be wasted, until Asshur shall carry you away captive.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיִּשָּׂ֥א מְשָׁל֖וֹ וַיֹּאמַ֑ר א֕וֹי מִ֥י יִחְיֶ֖ה מִשֻּׂמ֥וֹ אֵֽל׃
verses.text_kjv: And he took up his parable, and said, Alas, who shall live when God doeth this!
verses.rendering: he took up his parable, and said, Alas, who shall live when God doeth this!
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וְצִים֙ מִיַּ֣ד כִּתִּ֔ים וְעִנּ֥וּ אַשּׁ֖וּר וְעִנּוּ־עֵ֑בֶר וְגַם־ה֖וּא עֲדֵ֥י אֹבֵֽד׃
verses.text_kjv: And ships shall come from the coast of Chittim, and shall afflict Asshur, and shall afflict Eber, and he also shall perish for ever.
verses.rendering: ships shall come from the coast of Chittim, and shall afflict Asshur, and shall afflict Eber, and he also shall perish for ever.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיָּ֣קׇם בִּלְעָ֔ם וַיֵּ֖לֶךְ וַיָּ֣שׇׁב לִמְקֹמ֑וֹ וְגַם־בָּלָ֖ק הָלַ֥ךְ לְדַרְכּֽוֹ׃ {פ}
verses.text_kjv: And Balaam rose up, and went and returned to his place: and Balak also went his way.
verses.rendering: Balaam rose up, and went and returned to his place: and Balak also went his way.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.
